generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab
instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "A lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in the port of Antwerp",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalSystem, DigitalTwinSystem
]
instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for database, MQTT broker, and Grafana services",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for operational data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]
instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time messaging between services",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module 'gantrylib' for crane control and data handling",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller interfacing sensors and motor controllers"
]
instance TMC4671Eval : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor controller for stepper motors"
]
instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for mechanical design",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for Arcadia models",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]
instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Repository for version control",
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]
instance MkDocs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Documentation generation tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables DocumentationService
]
instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization and dashboard tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs crane operational data to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides LogDataAction
]
instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time status visualization and operator control via Grafana dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusVisualization, OperatorNotificationAction
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulations for validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal movement paths using kinematic models",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight, MoveCartAction, MoveHoistAction, ActivateElectromagnetAction
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics and controller behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]
instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System modeling using Capella",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemModelInsight
]
instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Version control using GitHub",
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]
instance DocumentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Documentation generation using MkDocs",
    DTDFVocab:provides DocumentationInsight
]
instance CartStepperMotorControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls cart stepper motor movement",
    DTDFVocab:provides MoveCartAction
]
instance HoistStepperMotorControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls hoist stepper motor movement",
    DTDFVocab:provides MoveHoistAction
]
instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized path for crane movement planning"
]
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Virtual execution results for crane dynamics"
]
instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates discrepancies between real and simulated crane behavior"
]
instance LogDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically logs crane state to database",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance RealTimeStatusVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of crane status for operational decisions"
]
instance OperatorNotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notifies operator of validation threshold breaches",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance MoveCartAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to move cart along horizontal axis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance MoveHoistAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to move hoist vertically",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ActivateElectromagnetAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate electromagnet to pick up containers",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal cart movement"
]
instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical hoist movement"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup at hoist end"
]
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mechanical design model from Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]
instance PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane system",
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, Arduino, TMC4671Eval
]
instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system",
    base:contains Docker, TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto, Grafana, Fusion360, Capella, GitHub, MkDocs, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, SystemModelingService, VersionControlService, DocumentationService, CartStepperMotorControlService, HoistStepperMotorControlService, CADModel, KinematicModel, TrajectoryOptimizationInsight, SimulationInsight, ValidationInsight, SystemModelInsight, VersionControlInsight, DocumentationInsight, RealTimeStatusVisualization, LogDataAction, OperatorNotificationAction, MoveCartAction, MoveHoistAction, ActivateElectromagnetAction
]
instance SystemModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System model for analysis and design"
]
instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control status and history"
]
instance DocumentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated documentation for system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Control Application (Python) are sent through the Physical Crane Interface to the TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for cart and hoist movement, enabling precise trajectory execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time data logging and validation with no specified time intervals; measurements and simulations are compared in real-time for continuous validation service."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized orchestration where physical components (crane frame, motors, sensors) interact with digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) via MQTT broker and TimescaleDB. Physical Crane Interface and Control Application mediate interactions between physical and digital layers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360, kinematic model) and 'as operated' (real-time sensor data logging and execution of physical movements). No mention of 'as manufactured' stage."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between executed trajectory measurements and simulated trajectories, comparing against predefined thresholds. Breaches trigger operator notifications for validation checks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time signaling between services; TimescaleDB for persistent data storage. Physical sensors connect to Arduino, which interfaces with the digital system via Python modules."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containers for TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; Python module 'gantrylib' installed via pip; all components deployed on a single personal computer as per deployment diagram (Figure 5)."
]
